_doc: State file written by the Fireflies → PPL Dash auto-ingest scheduled task. Tracks which transcripts have been processed so re-runs are idempotent. Do not edit by hand unless you know what you're doing.
lastRunMessage: Ingested GL6 + GL6 continued (user-triggered sync overriding regex guardrail). The two May 12 solo-Aryan recordings flagged by the prior nightly sync (01KRFAB18R5HQ57M1SNB39Y5QW and 01KRFHTP5EXPETC68P2469DECC) were processed despite their non-standard Fireflies titles, because the user explicitly requested ingest. GL6 main (2h 10m) covers airworthiness 3-prong definition, SPARROW + IM SAFE + AAV1ATE/88 mnemonics, A&P vs A&P-IA, tach vs Hobbs, Special Flight Permit/FSDO, ADs vs SBs, FAR Part 43 App A Para C preventative-maintenance script, POH vs PIM, 3 definitions of night, category/class/type + type-rating threshold, and the 5-check/3-do/1-decide inop-equipment framework with A-TOMATO-FLAMES + FLAPS + PEDS. GL6 continued (15 min) covers KSNA airspace stack (Charlie 3500-4400 / Echo from 700 AGL / Golf surface-699) and FAR 91.155 basic VFR weather minimums for all classes, day/night, and above/below 10,000 MSL. Generated: 2 lesson seeds (addGroundLessonOnce GL6 and GL6B, both lesson:6), 2 sparknotes chapters with 12 + 10 flashcards, 2 quizzes (12 + 10 questions). SW cache bumped v19 → v20. JS validated with node --check (clean).
